title: SDSF Job Inspection
description: Use SDSF to examine running jobs, output, and system activity.

steps.title: Display Active Jobs
steps.screen:
SDSF DA (Display Active)

NP   JOBNAME  STEPNAME PROCSTEP  JOBID    OWNER    C  EXCP
     JES2     JES2              STC00001 STCUSER  A  12345
     VTAM     VTAM              STC00002 STCUSER  A  8901
     TSO001   IKJEFT01          TSU00015 HERC01   A  234
     BACKUP   IEBCOPY  STEP1    JOB00045 IBMUSER  A  5678
steps.expected: Identify running address spaces and their owners.
steps.hint: OWNER column shows who started each job. STC=Started Task, TSU=TSO User, JOB=Batch.
steps.assessment: Q2: Each address space runs under a specific identity established at startup.

steps.title: Job Output Queue
steps.screen:
SDSF H (Held Output)

NP   JOBNAME  JOBID    OWNER    C  DEST     TOT-REC
     BACKUP   JOB00045 IBMUSER  H  LOCAL    15234
     REPORT   JOB00044 HERC01   H  LOCAL    892
     COMPILE  JOB00043 HERC01   H  LOCAL    3456
steps.expected: View job output and understand the SYSOUT model.
steps.hint: Output stays in JES spool until printed or purged. Can contain sensitive data.
steps.assessment: Q3: Job output is retained - deferred availability of results.

steps.title: Examine Job JCL
steps.expected: Extract JCL from a completed job to understand what it accessed.
steps.hint: Job JCL reveals datasets accessed, programs run, and processing logic.
steps.assessment: Q3: Retained job info shows what ran and under whose authority.

steps.title: System Log
steps.screen:
SDSF LOG

14:22:31 HERC01   TSO LOGON
14:23:45 HERC01   ISPF ENTRY
14:25:12 ICH408I  HERC01 NOT AUTH TO SYS1.PARMLIB
14:30:00 JOB00045 BACKUP STARTED
14:45:23 JOB00045 BACKUP ENDED CC=0000
steps.expected: Use system log to trace user activity and security events.
steps.hint: ICH messages are RACF security events. LOG shows timeline of activity.
steps.assessment: Q2: Every authorization check is logged - audit trail exists.
